rules.suggestion: Consider anti-inflammatory strategy and closer colon surveillance.
rules.rationale: High Fusobacterium abundance is treated as a high-risk inflammatory marker in the prototype rule base.

rules.suggestion: Consider microbiota-modulating intervention and response monitoring.
rules.rationale: Porphyromonas elevation is treated as a marker of ecological disturbance in the prototype rule base.
Reduced Lactobacillus is treated as a protective signal loss in the prototype rule base.
